multilane._help: Set 'enabled' to true and add the lanes you want. Each lane uses Claude Code as its driver but routes requests to a different provider via ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (set in .archon/.env).

_examples._help: Copy any of these into the 'lanes' list above to enable. Set the keys named in '_env' inside .archon/.env first.

kimi._extras: No extras package needed — Moonshot speaks the Anthropic API natively.

deepseek._extras: No extras package needed — DeepSeek speaks the Anthropic API natively.
